channel.title: Gods & Heroes on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Gods & Heroes on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Daily Blogroll 12/29: Super Duper edition
item.description: I long ago pre-ordered SOE’s DC Universe Online, but this was my first opportunity to play it, in beta, on the PC. Though it’s on the PC, the little picture hints and controls clearly expect you to be using a PS3 controller to play the game. I don’t have a PS3 controller, but I do have a XBox controller, so I plugged it in and away I went.
